Summary

Your father Taro married a woman named Yukiko a few years ago, but without any apparent explanation, he abandoned you, Yukiko, and her daughter Samara—your stepsister. After that, for years, Yukiko raised you and Samara with great love and care, but love can't always hide desire...

Desperate for intimacy, and you being in your teenage years, you had sexual relations, which turned out to be incredibly satisfying for both of you. You began having sex whenever you wanted, but your sister Samara became jealous, complicating this strange dynamic within what was supposed to be a happy, functional family.

Now, after three years of this arrangement, what was once strange has become commonplace, meaning you can have sex with your stepmother whenever you want, because she loves it. But be careful, your sister doesn't like sharing.
